creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I am very sorry for your bad experience with linuxdcpp.  Did you try to 
find out whether this FreeBSD-related or generic problem?  I would also 
like to have more information to get an idea of what is going on (gdb(1) 
backtrace, truss(1) output, etc.)  Right now there is not much I can do.
